datasets_for_table.description: Largest weed dataset. 16 species, VOC XML bboxes + segmentation.
8 Australian weed species + negative. Classification only.
Current primary dataset. 12 cotton weed species.
Crop and weed bounding boxes in Pascal VOC.

GitHub ★2: 🌿 Weed Detection Model – YOLOv5 This repository contains a custom-trained YOLOv5 object detection model designed to identify four common weed species: - Lantana - Siam Weed - Parthenium - Snake Weed  The model was trained on a self-curated and annotated dataset using Roboflow for labeling
GitHub ★1: This project contains the WEED-YOLO model structure, the datasets used, and related content.

GitHub ★5: This project uses YOLOv8 and Machine Learning to detect coconut tree diseases in real-time, helping farmers take quick action. It leverages computer vision, custom dataset training, and real-time inference to enhance crop health and yield. 🚀🌱
GitHub ★1: The repository was used to train the YOLOv9 model based on a dataset of bee colonies collected at the Vietnam National University of Agriculture (VNUA).

GitHub ★1: YOLOv8-based computer vision system for tomato detection, size analysis, and weight estimation. Features real-time processing, QR code integration, and custom dataset training for agricultural applications.
Corn or Maize Leaf Disease Dataset
crop and weed detection data with bounding boxes
Tomato Leaf Diseases Detection Computer Vision
GitHub ★1: The repository was used to train the YOLOv9 model based on a dataset of bee colonies collected at the Vietnam National University of Agriculture (VNUA).
